short_summary: Iran deal Sunday claim; Tren de Aragua strike
rationale: Trump's claim of an imminent Iran deal signing is the dominant story for US residents given its implications for Middle East policy and oil markets; the confirmed killing of the Tren de Aragua leader in a US airstrike is a direct domestic security and foreign policy action.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: A finalized Iran nuclear/sanctions deal would be a major US foreign policy event affecting oil prices, Middle East stability, and domestic political debate. Tehran's contradiction creates uncertainty.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in airstrike
top_events.summary: A US military airstrike killing the Tren de Aragua leader is a direct domestic security action with political significance, continuing the Trump administration's aggressive posture on gang threats.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Ongoing federal AI security scrutiny affecting a major US tech company; relevant to US tech sector and AI policy but no new qualitative escalation this cycle.
